idea-plugin.name: Kshana - PNT simulator
idea-plugin.description:
Run Kshana — the open, reproducible positioning/navigation/timing (PNT) resilience simulator — directly from your JetBrains IDE.

Right-click any scenario .toml and choose Run Kshana Scenario; the figures of merit and result JSON stream into the Kshana tool window. Set the path to the kshana binary in Settings → Tools → Kshana (install it with cargo install kshana).

Scenarios cover SGP4/SDP4 orbits, IAU reference frames, Allan deviations, GNSS availability/DOP, ARAIM protection levels, GNSS/INS fusion, and quantum-sensor models — each carrying an explicit, machine-checkable verification status (validated against an external oracle, or transparently modelled). See https://kshana.dev.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.21.0 — the plugin now versions in lockstep with the Kshana engine, so the Marketplace version always matches the kshana release it targets. This build is also relicensed to AGPL-3.0-only (a commercial licence is available from Ashforde OÜ; see the repository's LICENSING.md) — no functional change to the plugin itself, but it brings the published artifact in line with the open-source engine's current licence.
0.1.1 — maintenance release; first build delivered through continuous publishing. Requires the kshana CLI (cargo install kshana); compatible with JetBrains IDEs 2024.3 and newer.

action.description: Run the selected TOML as a Kshana scenario
